column1: Chinese Title: 随它吧 (Suí Tā Ba)
The snow glows white on the mountain tonight
column2: 白雪发亮 铺满我的过往 (Báixuě fāliàng pūmǎn wǒ de guòwǎng)

column1: Not a footprint to be seen
column2: 没有脚印的地方 (Méiyǒu jiǎoyìn de dìfāng)
孤立的王国很荒凉 (Gūlì de wángguó hěn huāngliáng)

column1: And it looks like I'm the queen
column2: 我是这里的女皇 (Wǒ shì zhèlǐ de nǚhuáng)

column1: The wind is howling like this swirling storm inside
column2: 漫天飞雪 在心里疯狂飞扬 (Màntiān fēixuě zài xīnlǐ fēngkuáng fēiyáng)

column1: Couldn't keep it in heaven knows I've tried
column2: 消极的想法 哪怕一如既往 (Xiāojí de xiǎngfǎ nǎpà yīrújìwǎng)

column1: Don't let them in don't let them see
column2: 不被任何人看穿真相 (Bù bèi rènhé rén kànchuān zhēnxiàng)

column1: Be the good girl you always have to be
column2: 做个好女孩 像从前一样 (Zuò gè hǎo nǚhái xiàng cóngqián yīyàng)

column1: Conceal don't feel don't let them know
column2: 关上门 别去想 哪怕这真相 (Guānshàng mén bié qù xiǎng nǎpà zhè zhēnxiàng)

column1: Let it go let it go
column2: 随它吧 随它吧 (Suí tā ba suí tā ba)
回头已没办法 (Huítóu yǐ méi bànfǎ)

column1: Let it go let it go
column2: 随它吧 随它吧 (Suí tā ba suí tā ba)

column1: Turn away and slam the door
column2: 一转身不再牵挂 (Yī zhuǎnshēn bù zài qiānguà)

column1: I don't care what they're going to say
column2: 我不管 他们想说的话 (Wǒ bùguǎn tāmen xiǎng shuō dehuà)
任风吹雨打 (Rèn fēng chuī yǔ dǎ)

column1: The cold never bothered me anyway
column2: 反正冰天雪地我也不怕 (Fǎnzhèng bīngtiān xuědì wǒ yě bùpà)
